tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Nikola Jokic is one of the most skilled centers in NBA history and known for his elite passing ability.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: Jokic won multiple NBA MVP awards and led the Denver Nuggets to the 2023 NBA Championship.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: He is famous for his unique playmaking ability as a center.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Bogdan Bogdanovic is one of the best Serbian shooters in modern basketball.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He has played a major role for Serbia in international tournaments.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Bogdanovic previously played in the EuroLeague before joining the NBA.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Vlade Divac was one of the first successful European players in the NBA.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He played more than 1000 NBA games and became a basketball executive after retirement.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Divac was inducted into the Basketball Hall of Fame.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Peja Stojakovic was one of the best three point shooters of his generation.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He won the NBA championship with the Dallas Mavericks in 2011.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Stojakovic was a three time NBA All Star.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Milos Teodosic is considered one of the best European point guards of his era.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He won the EuroLeague MVP award and multiple European championships.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Teodosic is known for his incredible passing and court vision.
